name: Fortanix
description: Fortanix — confidential computing platform with data security manager for keys, secrets, and tokenization.

seo.title: Fortanix — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Fortanix: Fortanix — confidential computing platform with data security manager for keys, secrets, and tokenization.

when_to_use: HSM-backed key management for enterprise data encryption
Confidential computing for sensitive data processing workloads
Tokenization service API for PCI DSS cardholder data
Multi-cloud key management with FIPS 140-2 Level 3 compliance
Secrets lifecycle management for regulated financial services

pros: DSM unifies keys, secrets, and tokenization
cons: Enterprise pricing out of reach for small teams
Learning curve for confidential computing model
review.verdict: A serious option when HSM-grade key custody and confidential computing actually matter.
review.best_for: Banks, healthcare, and gov teams needing FIPS-level key protection.
review.not_for: SaaS startups fine with cloud KMS and a standard vault.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
